summary: Progress tracking and detailed logging feature testing completed successfully. All 13 backend tests passed. The new generate_video_with_progress() method correctly returns stats object with step timing info (step2Time through step6Time) and status fields (locationImage, hostImage, backgroundImage, overlay, encoding). Backend logs show [STEP 1/6] through [STEP 6/6] progression with SUCCESS/FAIL status.

minor.issue: Lemonada font not found warning - falling back to DejaVu. Font path '/usr/share/fonts/opentype/lemonada/Lemonada-Bold.otf' not available.

critical_code_review_comments: Progress tracking implemented correctly with [STEP 1/6] through [STEP 6/6] logging
Stats object includes all required fields: step2Time, step3Time, step4Time, step5Time, step6Time
Status fields correctly report 'loaded' or 'placeholder' for images
Graceful error handling with fallback to placeholders when assets not found
Video encoding step (step6) takes ~30 seconds which is the majority of generation time
context_for_next_testing_agent: Progress tracking feature is fully functional. Stats object in generate response includes: totalTime, step2Time (location), step3Time (host), step4Time (background), step5Time (overlay), step6Time (encoding), locationImage, hostImage, backgroundImage, overlay, encoding, resolvedRounds, videoSize. Backend logs show detailed [STEP X/6] progression. Video generation takes ~30-60 seconds total with encoding being the slowest step (~30s).

verified_features.5-round presentation: PASS - Video generated with correct stats
verified_features.6-round presentation: PASS - Video generated with correct stats and 6 resolved rounds
